## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded package versions added (versions come from the live check).
- [ ] Plain ASCII only: no em or en dashes, no curly quotes, no AI-cadence prose.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` files stayed short; detail went into `references/`.
- [ ] Shell scripts still pass shellcheck.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits.
